problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: DICE: Dynamic Intelligence Countermeasures Engine a complete DDoS Framework
summary: Design a technical platform that evaluates tenders, understands bidders, checks eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports.
optimization_claims: AI Coordinator with confidence scoring and automated decisions
missing_components: Missing specific components for tender understanding and evaluation, such as Natural Language Processing (NLP) or Optical Character Recognition (OCR) systems
